project.title: Flag-GABPα overexpression HEK293T cells LC-MS/MS
project.projectDescription: Immunoprecipitated by Flag and IgG antibody for protein capture by LC-MS/MS in HEK293T cells infected with GABPα-Flag overexpression plasmid.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: For the preparation of LC/MS-MS, Flag-GABPα plasmid was transfected into HEK293T cells for 72 h. The protein-IgG/Flag antibody-magnetic beads complex was subjected to LC/MS-MS analysis by Bioprofile Biotechnology Co., Ltd (Shanghai, China).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The main steps of the large-scale protein identification (Shotgun) project process include: protein enzymatic digestion, LC-MS/MS analysis, MaxQuant database search, data analysis and experimental report, etc.

FactorValue[Experimental]: control IgG (2 µg, Proteintech, Wuhan, China, Cat# B900620)
Comment[SpecilizedMS]: The protein‐IgG/Flag antibody‐magnetic beads complex was subjected to LC/MS‐MS analysis by Bioprofile Biotechnology Co., Ltd (Shanghai, China).
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: Protein A/G magnetic beads were incubated with control IgG (2 µg, Proteintech, Wuhan, China, Cat# B900620) and primary antibodies against His (2 µg, Proteintech, Wuhan, China, Cat# 66005‐1‐Ig) with end‐end rotation at 4 °C for 2 h.

Characteristics[GeneticModification]: Flag‐GABPα plasmid was transfected into HEK293T cells for 72 h.
Comment[SpecilizedMS]: The protein‐IgG/Flag antibody‐magnetic beads complex was subjected to LC/MS‐MS analysis by Bioprofile Biotechnology Co., Ltd (Shanghai, China).
Comment[EnrichmentMethod]: Protein A/G magnetic beads were incubated with control IgG (2 µg, Proteintech, Wuhan, China, Cat# B900620) and primary antibodies against His (2 µg, Proteintech, Wuhan, China, Cat# 66005‐1‐Ig) with end‐end rotation at 4 °C for 2 h.
